settings.heading: Editions
settings.text: Collector runs organized by format, release window, and archive status.

settings.label: Open Release
settings.heading: Timed Availability
settings.text: Available during a defined release window before moving to archive status.

settings.label: Limited Run
settings.heading: Restricted Allocation
settings.text: Small-batch editions with finite quantity and no guaranteed restock.

settings.label: Archive Piece
settings.heading: Collector Hold
settings.text: Closed releases preserved as reference entries inside the Render-Lab archive.
